subject: [PATCH v4 01/11] mm: add PMD swap entry detection support

2026-07-13.patch_summary: This patch adds support for detecting PMD (Page Map Directory) swap entries in the Linux kernel. Currently, when a huge page is swapped out, it's split into 512 PTE-level swap entries, but this patch introduces infrastructure to identify and handle PMD-level swap entries instead. The patch teaches the softleaf layer to recognize these entries and adds helper functions for architectures that support PMD softleaf entries. This change will be used in later patches to preserve huge page information across swap cycles.
